text:
CMS. 

SHORT NAME: CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 

LONG NAME: CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Encounter Data System (EDS) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 3-digit numeric 

COMMENT: You need to know both the contract number (variable called CNTRCT_NUM) and plan benefit package 
number (plan ID) to identify the specific plan in which a beneficiary was enrolled. CNTRCT_PBP_NUM 
is not submitted by the MAO on an encounter data record; the MAO
